_rule: A row NEVER carries a price unless it carries a verified_on date. The flag reports the row and its age, not a value.

structural_markers._note: Source 2 of the flag: fires independent of any row below. Catches the obviously special card no list anticipated.
structural_markers.asterisk_signature_note: In Riftbound, an asterisk in the card number marks an artist-signed overnumber. Handled in code, not by regex on the name.

chases.name: Tour Guide From the Underworld
chases.why: Chase pedigree; value swings hard by printing. BP01/CT09 printings are bulk.
chases.grade_watch: Printing-dependent. Confirm set code before any value claim.

chases.name: Dark Armed Dragon
chases.why: Original 2007 Phantom Darkness secret carries value; every reprint (SDDC-EN012 etc.) is low.
chases.grade_watch: Reprint unless proven otherwise.

chases.name: Interlude Theater — Scenario-E (SE)
chases.why: Named premium chase of the Smriti Heaven Scroll Edition (158 cards, 10 rarity levels). (Heaven Scroll Edition; SE here = Interlude Theater Scenario-E.)
chases.grade_watch: PSA grades Kayou; a $10,000 bounty stands for all four English chases in PSA 10. Graded demand is real.

chases.name: Color Window — Special (SP)
chases.why: Stained-glass premium chase, Heaven Scroll Edition. (Heaven Scroll Edition; SE here = Interlude Theater Scenario-E.)
chases.grade_watch: Same bounty context as SE.

chases.name: Konan (US exclusive)
chases.why: US-exclusive card in the Heaven Scroll Edition. (Heaven Scroll Edition; SE here = Interlude Theater Scenario-E.)
chases.grade_watch: [verify] whether the US exclusivity carries a premium.

chases.name: SuperFractor 1/1
chases.why: Top of the 2026 Topps Chrome Disney rainbow.
chases.grade_watch: Retail odds are far worse than hobby. A guaranteed Raywave/Diamante is NOT this.

chases.name: Red Refractor /5 and Raywave Refractor /5
chases.why: The /5 tier. Raywave Refractor /5 runs 1:32,356 hobby but 1:197,334 blaster and 1:209,189 value.
chases.grade_watch: Chromium: check centering, print lines, and edge chipping straight from the pack.

chases.name: Autographs (Depp, Cyrus, Lovato, Goodwin; Pirates triple; Princess quad)
chases.why: The real chase. First-time signers.
chases.grade_watch: On-card vs sticker matters. [verify]

chases.name: Debut cards (Toy Story 5, Zootopia 2)
chases.why: The set's rookie-card analogue; Toy Story 5 and Zootopia 2 flagged as driving strongest pre-release demand.
chases.grade_watch: Demand is hype-derived and may decay. Date any comp.

chases.name: [confirm/fill] Riftbound chase list
chases.why: No machine-readable DB available (DotGG API is access-gated). For this game the sheet IS the system.
chases.grade_watch: Identity comes off the card's printed set code and collector number.

chases.why: Chapter Jin S3 SR. [verify] Verified sources say the US-exclusive promo is Naruto PR-009 or Sasuke PR-010, not Kidomaru.
chases.grade_watch: PSA grades Kayou. ANY serial number is a chase; the tier ladder is verified, the ORDER within it is not.

set_rules.why: 88 base + 36 secret rares = 124. Any collector number >= 89 is a secret rare, whether or not it is named below.
set_rules.sources: PokeBeach set guide; Beckett ME03 checklist; CardGrader (#124/088, #121/088)

set_rules.why: 219-card main set; overnumber cards begin at 220. Baron Nashor Ultimate Rare is 238/219.
set_rules.sources: Card Gamer (219 main set, overnumber begins 220, Baron 238/219); riftdaily; Riot's own Unleashed overview (<0.1% of packs, one Ultimate Rare max per pack)

set_rules.why: No overnumbering: all 60 cards are base-numbered. Chase status comes from RARITY (Starlight, Collector's Rare), which the structural markers catch. secret_from disabled.
set_rules.sources: Konami product page (yugioh-card.com/en/products/jush/); Yugipedia; 60 cards = 10 UR / 10 SR / 40 R, plus 10 Starlight + 15 Collector's Rare

set_rules.why: 185 cards / 13 rarities. FIVE serialized chase tiers: diamondASP /9, ASP /99, SE /220, AR /777, BP /999. Any serial number = chase. New types this set: ASP, diamondASP, diamondUR.
set_rules.sources: Crossing TCG + 9 Tails (185 cards/13 rarities, 5 serialized tiers, exact denominators); Kayou official reveal via Andy Collectz
set_rules._conflict: [verify] GameStop/Best Buy list 177 cards / 12 rarities for the 003A sleeved booster; retailers list 185/13 for the display box. Likely different SKUs. Does not affect the serial rule.
